---
title: 'Dilogue'
date: '2011-10-25T05:45:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4373974355542656766'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/dilogue.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Growing Up'
---

<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 14px;"></span><br />
<ul class="commentList" style="list-style-type: none; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px;">
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211423 ufiItem ufiItem" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 5px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="padding-top: 2px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: black;">This was so&nbsp;interesting&nbsp;I felt I needed to keep it somewhere. I didn't argue. I stated a non emotional response based on the position of the people... I also discovered something. I've always know this, said it in many ways, but hadn't said it this way before:</span></div>
<div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="padding-top: 2px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: grey;"><br /></span></div>
<div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: #333333;">"The idea that you must give up things to come to God is not true. God doesn't want you to give up anything to come to Him..."</span></div>
<div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: black;"><br /></span></div>
<div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="color: black;">I feel a writing coming on about this... We shall see.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<br /></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211505 ufiItem ufiItem uiUfiUnseenItem" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; border-left-color: rgb(168, 178, 206); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 2px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="ugkhlu_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="ugkhlu_1" name="delete[5211505]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text">‎@How did God get here? This is an illogical question. If you have studied logical thinking. Your premise is wrong. For you assume by it that God must come from somewhere. This depends on your definition of God. In a traditional Judeo-Christian world view "God" is defined as a being who has no beginning or end. Therefore in the mind of a of this person you are asking: "How did the one who never began begin?" This is illogical. "Show me the sides of a circle?" This is an illogical question. "Show me the sides of an entity that has no sides?" Therefore in order for you all to have an intelligent conversation on the matter you must all come to a universal consensus on the definition of your terms. Otherwise, by each one using his own definition no real argument can be made by either side, one thus must agree to disagree or disembark from the conversation.</span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:32:02 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:32am">10 minutes ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211505 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211505]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211505"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211508 ufiItem ufiItem" id="5211508" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 5px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="uglghd_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uglghd_1" name="delete[5211508]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text"><a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank"><span>http://empoweredtooprosper</span><wbr></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block;"></span>.blogspot.com/</a></span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:32:40 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:32am">9 minutes ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211508 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211508]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211508"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211509 ufiItem ufiItem" id="5211509" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 5px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="uglied_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="uglied_1" name="delete[5211509]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text"><a href="http://kogconcepts.wordpress.com/" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank"><span>http://kogconcepts.wordpre</span><wbr></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block;"></span>ss.com/</a></span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:32:45 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:32am">9 minutes ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211509 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211509]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211509"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211516 ufiItem ufiItem uiUfiUnseenItem" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; border-left-color: rgb(168, 178, 206); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 2px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="ugn8l4_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="ugn8l4_1" name="delete[5211516]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text">I hope this helps clear things up for you David Alejandro Restrepo</span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:34:10 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:34am">8 minutes ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211516 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211516]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211516"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211546 ufiItem ufiItem uiUfiUnseenItem" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; border-left-color: rgb(168, 178, 206); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 2px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="ugsidj_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="ugsidj_1" name="delete[5211546]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text">Incidentally from a social standpoint. People are arguing and complaining about how social security is under funded. But with the removal of 50 million potential human beings from society was the removal of the majority of those producing in society and paying into social security. Therefore we, as a society, introduced a system that is paid by the proceeding generation and then terminated the next paying generation. From a non biblical purely logical standpoint this doesn't work. We must cease to destroy the paying population or cease depending on them. Quite simple math really.</span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:38:16 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:38am">4 minutes ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211546 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211546]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211546"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211548 ufiItem ufiItem uiUfiUnseenItem" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; border-left-color: rgb(168, 178, 206); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 2px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="ugsqn1_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="ugsqn1_1" name="delete[5211548]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text"><a href="http://www.guttmacher.org/pubs/fb_induced_abortion.html" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank"><span>http://www.guttmacher.org/</span><wbr></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block;"></span><span>pubs/fb_induced_abortion.h</span><wbr></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block;"></span>tml</a></span><span><div class="mvm uiStreamAttachments clearfix" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:10}" style="margin-bottom: 10px; margin-top: 10px; zoom: 1;">
<div class="UIImageBlock clearfix" style="zoom: 1;">
<a aria-hidden="true" class="external UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_MED_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:41}" href="http://www.guttmacher.org/pubs/fb_induced_abortion.html" rel="nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 10px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank" title=""><img alt="" class="img" src="http://external.ak.fbcdn.net/safe_image.php?d=AQBcdT_pa4b8ViqS&amp;w=90&amp;h=90&amp;url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.guttmacher.org%2Fgraphics%2Ffactsheets%2F2011%2F01%2F10%2FIB-induced-abortion-c2.gif" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; max-height: 90px; max-width: 90px;" /></a><div class="UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_MED_Content fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; display: table-cell; font-size: 11px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<div class="uiAttachmentTitle" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:11}" style="color: #333333; word-wrap: break-word;">
<strong><a href="http://www.guttmacher.org/pubs/fb_induced_abortion.html" rel="nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Facts on Induced Abortion in the United States</a></strong></div>
<span class="caption"><a href="http://www.guttmacher.org/" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">www.guttmacher.org</a></span><div class="mts uiAttachmentDesc translationEligibleUserAttachmentMessage" style="margin-top: 5px; word-wrap: break-word;">
Fact sheet containing the most up-to-date research and policy information</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:38:27 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:38am">3 minutes ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211548 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211548]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211548"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<label class="uiLinkButton async_throbber" style="color: #666666; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; vertical-align: middle;"><input class="stat_elem" name="remove_preview_id[5211548]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Lucida Grande', Tahoma, Verdana, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: top;" type="submit" value="Remove Preview" /></label></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
<li class="uiUfiComment comment_5211563 ufiItem ufiItem" id="5211563" style="background-color: #edeff4; border-bottom-color: rgb(210, 217, 231); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; margin-top: 1px; padding-bottom: 4px; padding-left: 5px; padding-right: 5px; padding-top: 5px;"><div class="UIImageBlock clearfix uiUfiActorBlock" style="zoom: 1;">
<a class="actorPic UIImageBlock_Image UIImageBlock_SMALL_Image" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:34}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-right: 8px; text-decoration: none;" tabindex="-1"><img alt="" class="uiProfilePhoto uiProfilePhotoMedium img" src="http://profile.ak.fbcdn.net/hprofile-ak-snc4/211573_1161581523_2554096_q.jpg" style="border-bottom-width: 0px; border-color: initial; border-left-width: 0px; border-right-width: 0px; border-style: initial; border-top-width: 0px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;" /></a><label class="deleteAction stat_elem UIImageBlock_Ext uiCloseButton" for="ugwokv_1" style="background-image: url(http://static.ak.fbcdn.net/rsrc.php/v1/yA/r/4WSewcWboV8.png); background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; color: #666666; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; float: right; font-weight: bold; height: 15px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; opacity: 0; overflow-x: hidden; overflow-y: hidden; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px; zoom: 1;"><input id="ugwokv_1" name="delete[5211563]" style="cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; outline-color: initial; outline-style: none; outline-width: initial; padding-bottom: 18px; padding-left: 18px; padding-right: 18px; padding-top: 18px;" title="Remove" type="submit" /></label><div class="commentContent UIImageBlock_Content UIImageBlock_SMALL_Content" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:33}" style="display: table-cell; padding-top: 1px; vertical-align: top; width: 10000px;">
<a class="actorName" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:35}" data-hovercard="/ajax/hovercard/user.php?id=1161581523" href="http://www.facebook.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Darrell G. Wolfe</a>&nbsp;<span class="commentBody" data-jsid="text">‎@Justin Blair The idea that you must give up things to come to God is not true. God doesn't want you to give up anything to come to Him. In fact he is not, at first, interested in what you do or don't do. He simply wants to Love you and have fellowship with you which is what Jesus died to give you. Jesus died so that we could be loved by his daddy in heaven. Being in God's presence will cause change. But this comes from the inside out NOT the outside in. You don't change anything. He changes you. Keep drinking daily and hourly if you want to. But spend enough time in his presence and you won't want to.&nbsp;<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" rel="nofollow nofollow" style="color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank"><span>http://empoweredtooprosper</span><wbr></wbr><span class="word_break" style="display: inline-block;"></span>.blogspot.com/</a></span><div class="commentActions fsm fwn fcg" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px; padding-top: 2px;">
<abbr class="timestamp livetimestamp" data-date="Mon, 24 Oct 2011 22:41:28 -0700" style="border-bottom-color: initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-width: initial;" title="Tuesday, October 25, 2011 at 12:41am">a few seconds ago</abbr>&nbsp;·&nbsp;<span class="comment_like_5211563 fsm fwn fcg" data-ft="{&quot;type&quot;:36}" style="color: grey; font-size: 11px;"><button class="stat_elem as_link cmnt_like_link" name="like_comment_id[5211563]" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: initial; background-image: none; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-style: none; border-color: initial; border-left-style: none; border-right-style: none; border-top-style: none; border-width: initial; color: #3b5998; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'lucida grande', tahoma, verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: 0px; overflow-x: visible; overflow-y: visible; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; padding-top: 0px; text-align: left; width: auto;" title="Like this comment" type="submit" value="5211563"><span class="default_message" style="display: inline;">Like</span></button></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</li>
</ul>
